data.title: Proposed U.S. Stablecoin Limits May Impact USDC Adoption
data.description: Citi has indicated that the proposed U.S. restrictions on stablecoin rewards could potentially hinder the adoption of USDC. According to NS3.AI, this follows a decline of approximately 20% in Circle's shares on Tuesday. Bernstein noted that while the draft legislation would prohibit yield on passive stablecoin balances, it would still permit activity-based rewards, thereby not affecting Circle's reserve-income model.

data.title: Global Markets Face Disruption Amid Energy, Interest Rate, and Geopolitical Tensions
data.description:
On March 26, global markets are experiencing significant disruptions due to three concurrent developments. According to BlockBeats, the United States is easing E15 gasoline restrictions and accelerating the acquisition of oil and gold from Venezuela, aiming to suppress energy prices and regain supply chain dominance. Meanwhile, Japan's rising interest rate expectations and the global bond sell-off indicate a market shift towards repricing inflation and tightening policy paths. Additionally, tensions in the Middle East are escalating, with the U.S. increasing military presence and Iran responding firmly, heightening risks to energy transport and strait control.

This combination of energy price suppression, liquidity tightening, and geopolitical risk amplification is fundamentally altering the existing pricing framework. Energy is being politically manipulated, interest rate expectations are losing their easing outlook, and safe-haven assets like gold are being physically mobilized rather than merely traded. This shift signifies a movement of capital from financial assets to physical and strategic resources, marking a phase of global liquidity redistribution rather than expansion.

In the cryptocurrency market, Bitcoin is no longer the narrative leader but instead passively reflects whether capital is willing to take on risk. Current price movements are confined within the $69,000 to $72,000 range, with significant short positions and liquidation clusters forming resistance around $72,000, while liquidity support and long positions accumulate between $69,000 and $72,000, creating passive support. The overall structure is characterized by a "two-way confrontation," where price fluctuations are driven by liquidation rather than trends.

Until macroeconomic uncertainties are resolved, the market is unlikely to establish a unilateral pricing logic. Bitcoin is expected to remain compressed within liquidity-dense areas, with price movements driven by liquidation sweeps facilitating chip redistribution. The true directional choice will depend on whether there is a synchronized change in the three factors: energy spiraling out of control, confirmed interest rate tightening, and the Middle East shifting from "threat" to "actual blockade."

data.title: Analysis: The Federal Reserve may face a dilemma regarding its dual mandate.
data.description: Benjamin Louvet, an analyst at Offi Investment Asset Management, stated in a report that the Federal Reserve may face a dilemma regarding its dual mandate of employment and inflation: should it raise interest rates to combat inflation, or should it lower rates to support economic growth and employment? The head of commodities stated, "Since raising rates cannot mitigate supply shocks without harming economic growth, the Fed seems unlikely to choose to do so." Furthermore, declining incomes in Gulf states, major buyers of US Treasury bonds, could weaken US debt financing and force the Fed to lower interest rates or even resume bond purchases to support the economy. (Jinshi)

data.title: Iran's Parliament Speaker: Hezbollah is the Pride of the Islamic World
data.description: Iran's Parliament Speaker, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, has declared Hezbollah as the pride of the Islamic world. According to Jin10, Ghalibaf made this statement during a recent address, emphasizing the group's significance and influence within the region. He highlighted Hezbollah's role in resisting external pressures and its contributions to the Islamic community. Ghalibaf's remarks underscore Iran's continued support for Hezbollah, reflecting the broader geopolitical dynamics in the Middle East. The statement comes amid ongoing tensions and conflicts in the region, where Hezbollah remains a key player.

data.title: Iranian Official: Turkey and Pakistan Aiding Iran in Establishing Common Ground with U.S.
data.description: An Iranian senior official has stated that Turkey and Pakistan are actively working to assist Iran in finding common ground with the United States. According to Jin10, this development comes amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and efforts to improve diplomatic relations between Iran and the U.S. The involvement of Turkey and Pakistan highlights the regional interest in fostering dialogue and reducing tensions. The official emphasized the importance of collaboration and dialogue in addressing mutual concerns and achieving stability in the region.

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Increases Holdings with Recent Purchase
data.description: A Bitcoin whale has made another significant acquisition, purchasing 100 BTC approximately five hours ago. According to PANews, the transaction was valued at around $6.99 million. Over the past six months, this address, beginning with 'bc1pvu,' has accumulated a total of 1,046 BTC, investing approximately $72.78 million. The average purchase price is estimated at $92,300 per BTC, resulting in an unrealized loss of about $23.72 million.

data.title: USDT0 launches on Tempo, a payment-focused public blockchain, expanding its full-chain USD liquidity network.
data.description: USDT0, a fully-chain stablecoin, announced the launch of Tempo, a payment-oriented Layer 1 blockchain. Developed jointly by Stripe and Paradigm, Tempo focuses on predictable settlements, stable fees, and institutional-grade scalable infrastructure. This deployment marks USDT0's 23rd listing chain, covering the Ethereum mainnet and major Layer 2 networks, and expanding to emerging chains like Monad and HyperLiquid, as well as Bitcoin extension networks such as Corn and Rootstock, and USDT ecosystem chains like Stable and Plasma. USDT0 is issued based on LayerZero's fully-chained fungible token (OFT) standard, maintaining a 1:1 peg to USDT to ensure consistency across multiple chains and efficient liquidity migration. Tether previously made a strategic investment in LayerZero Labs, and since its launch last year, USDT0's cumulative trading volume has exceeded $70 billion within 12 months. (The Block)

data.title: Bill Maher to Receive Kennedy Center's Mark Twain Prize
data.description: Comedian and television host Bill Maher, known for his outspoken criticism of U.S. President Donald Trump and political correctness, is set to receive the prestigious Mark Twain Prize for American Humor from the Kennedy Center. New York Times posted on X, highlighting Maher's influence in the realm of political satire and his long-standing career in entertainment. The award, which celebrates individuals who have had an impact on American society in a manner similar to the distinguished 19th-century novelist and essayist Mark Twain, will be presented to Maher in recognition of his contributions to comedy and social commentary. Maher, who has been a prominent figure in television for decades, is celebrated for his sharp wit and ability to engage audiences in discussions on contemporary issues. The ceremony is expected to draw attention from both fans and critics alike, as Maher continues to be a polarizing figure in the media landscape.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump to Lead Saudi Arabia's Miami Beach Event Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is set to headline Saudi Arabia's annual display of influence and affluence in Miami Beach. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this year's event is overshadowed by the ongoing conflict in Iran. The gathering, known for its demonstration of power, will feature discussions and activities amidst geopolitical tensions.

data.title: Hedera Launches AI Development Platform to Enhance On-Chain Capabilities
data.description: Hedera has announced the launch of Hedera Agent Lab, a platform designed to assist developers in rapidly building on-chain AI agents. According to Foresight News, the platform is constructed using the open-source Hedera Agent Kit and offers three development modes: no-code, low-code, and advanced code. It supports frameworks such as LangChain and Vercel AI SDK, with plans to incorporate Google ADK in the future. Upcoming versions will feature a 'Strategy and Hooks' control panel and the Hedera Stablecoin Studio plugin, enabling functionalities like token exchange, lending, and stablecoin creation.

data.title: Retail Investors Hold Significant Shares in Strategy and STRC
data.description: Strategy CEO Phong Le recently tweeted that approximately 40% of MSTR shares are held by retail investors. According to PANews, the retail ownership of STRC stands at around 80%. Le noted that retail investors tend to prefer digital credit products that offer low volatility and higher returns.

data.title: U.S. Senate Faces Challenges in Recess Amid Homeland Security Funding Issues
data.description: U.S. Senate Majority Leader John Thune has expressed concerns over the Senate's ability to enter a recess due to unresolved funding for the Department of Homeland Security. According to Jin10, Thune emphasized the importance of addressing these financial matters before considering a break. The Senate is currently grappling with budgetary constraints that could impact national security operations. Thune's remarks highlight the urgency of securing necessary funds to ensure the continued functioning of Homeland Security. The situation underscores the broader challenges faced by lawmakers in balancing fiscal responsibilities with national security priorities.

data.title: UK Plans New Offshore Wind Farm Leases to Reduce Fossil Fuel Dependence
data.description: The United Kingdom is set to grant additional leases for offshore wind farms in the coming year, aiming to decrease its reliance on fossil fuels. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the country's ongoing efforts to transition towards renewable energy sources. This initiative is part of the UK's broader strategy to enhance its energy security and address environmental concerns. The move reflects the government's commitment to expanding its renewable energy infrastructure and reducing carbon emissions. Offshore wind farms are seen as a crucial component in achieving these goals, providing a sustainable and clean energy alternative. The upcoming lease awards are expected to attract significant interest from energy companies looking to invest in the UK's renewable sector.

data.title: Expert Predicts Major Buying Opportunity Amid Ongoing Conflict
data.description: Liquid Capital founder Yili Hua anticipates a significant buying opportunity to arise within this year. According to NS3.AI, Hua noted that the ongoing war is unlikely to conclude soon, and markets are currently in a state of anticipation, seeking greater clarity.

data.title: U.S. Stock Indices Experience Early Decline
data.description: In early trading, the three major U.S. stock indices showed a downward trend. According to RTHK, the Dow Jones Industrial Average was reported at 46,172 points, marking a decrease of 257 points or 0.55%. The S&P 500 Index stood at 6,538 points, down by 53 points or 0.81%. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq Composite Index was at 21,687 points, experiencing a drop of 242 points or 1.11%.

data.title: Increased Activity Observed in Hormuz Strait with Multiple Oil and Cargo Ships
data.description: Data indicates heightened activity in the Hormuz Strait, with several oil and cargo ships passing through today. According to PANews, the movement of vessels in this strategic waterway is being closely monitored. The Hormuz Strait is a critical passage for global oil transportation, and its traffic patterns are often scrutinized for potential impacts on international trade and energy markets.

data.title: Russia's Baltic Sea Oil Port Resumes Operations After Drone Attack
data.description: Russia's primary oil port in the Baltic Sea has recommenced loading activities following a recent attack by Ukrainian drones. Bloomberg posted on X that the company responsible for transporting crude to the port is seeking alternative destinations for its shipments due to the security concerns raised by the incidents. The resumption of operations marks a significant step in stabilizing the region's oil supply chain, although the ongoing conflict continues to pose challenges for energy logistics.

data.title: Gold and silver prices generally fell, while cryptocurrency volatility rose, with the BVIX increasing by 2.45%.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices fell to $4,443.28 per ounce, a daily decrease of 1.40%. Silver prices fell to $68.401 per ounce, a daily decrease of 3.92%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 52.66, a daily increase of 2.45%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 73.20, a daily decrease of 0.01%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.21% to 6.91665. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.14% to 159.578. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 1.12% to 5,569.17 points; the UK FTSE 100 fell 1.26% to 9,975.49 points; and the German DAX 40 fell 1.28% to 22,627.12 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 2.59% to $94.36 per barrel. Gate allows users to trade traditional financial market products directly on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: AI Adoption Urged by Liquid Capital Founder Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description: Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua recently shared insights on the X platform, emphasizing the prolonged nature of current conflicts and their impact on market conditions. According to Foresight News, Yi predicts a significant buying opportunity will arise this year, advising preparation in advance. Beyond the crypto sector, he has been deeply impressed by the transformative efficiency of AI, likening its impact to a leap from horse-drawn carriages to airplanes. Yi mandates that all companies he invests in must immediately learn to use and embrace AI, warning that those who fail to do so will face obsolescence. He notes that AI has leveled the playing field for companies and individuals, marking the onset of a new wave of innovation. This year, he plans to dedicate half of his time to collaborating with AI.

data.title: Tether Gold Token Launches on BNB Chain
data.description: Tether has announced the launch of its gold-backed token, Tether Gold (XAU₮), on the BNB Chain. According to PANews, this development provides BNB Chain users with access to tokenized assets linked to physical gold.
